eBird

Sparrowhawk
More info
eBird
(Accipiter nisus) 3+

  • 14/07/26 Holyrood Park 1 (Janet Davis) "Accipiter suddenly dove into brush after prey along nearby brushy hillside as I watched at fairly close range. Unsuccessful. Flew out with no prey and flew to top of ridge and perched in small tree. Moltin[...]"
  • 14/07/26 Warriston Cemetery and Puddocky 3 (Sam Shutt) "Both juveniles confident enough to explore the surrounding branches around the nest. They'll probably fledge in the next few days."
  • 12/07/26 Water of Leith--Colinton to Balerno 1 (Ben Haller)
